news.t: The Most Compelling ETF Launches in Q2
SEI Converts $1 Billion Mutual Fund Into High Yield Bond & Alternative Credit ETF (LEND)

overview.description: The SEI High Yield Bond & Alternative Credit ETF (LEND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund combines an external multi-manager, high-yield bond allocation with an internally actively managed collateralized loan obligation sleeve. The ETF aims to provide diversified exposure across traditional and alternative credit markets LEND was launched on May 18, 2026 and is issued by SEI.
